intro: A locked-room mystery could be hiding in the middle of everyday life.
description:
Strange incidents, hidden contradictions, and truths concealed within ordinary days.

In Locked-Room Mystery: Hidden Truths in Everyday Life, you will unravel a series of mysteries woven into familiar scenes from daily life.

Look closely at each case, spot what does not add up, and piece together the hidden truth behind seemingly impossible situations.

A mystery experience that is easy to pick up, yet satisfying to solve.
